content.verdict: Nobu Hotel Santorini — opened as part of the Matsuhisa global expansion and set on the dramatic Imerovigli cliff — is the island's most food-driven luxury address. 31 suites wrap down the caldera edge, most with private plunge pools, and the on-site Nobu Matsuhisa restaurant is a genuine destination (black cod miso with a caldera sunset is a serious honeymoon memory). Design is contemporary-Cycladic: crisp white architecture, warm wood, linen, and dramatic terraces. The vibe is adults-oriented and stylish rather than strictly adults-only, and the scale (31 keys) is still intimate. A great pick for couples who want design, food, and caldera drama in one package.
content.best_room: Caldera Suite with private heated plunge pool — generous terrace, direct caldera-and-sunset view, and a modern minimalist interior. The Grand Nobu Suite offers more space and a larger pool for the ultimate splurge.

itinerary_7_nights.description: Beach day at Perivolos / Perissa, dinner at Selene in Pyrgos.

caveats: Not strictly adults-only — families occasionally stay, though the pricing and food-focused positioning mean you'll rarely see children.
Nobu restaurant is excellent but expensive even by Santorini standards; budget accordingly.
The property is newer, which means pristine finishes but also slightly less 'traditional Santorini' character than a restored cave hotel.
Request a suite with the widest caldera angle.

faqs.a: No, but the atmosphere is strongly adult and design-led. Children are welcome but rare.

faqs.q: Is the Nobu restaurant open to non-guests?
faqs.a: Yes, but hotel guests get priority booking. Reserve well in advance — it's one of Santorini's hardest reservations.

faqs.q: Do all suites have a plunge pool?
faqs.a: Most do; confirm when booking. All entry-level suites share the stunning main infinity pool.

faqs.q: Where exactly on the caldera is the hotel?
faqs.a: Imerovigli — the highest point of the caldera rim, between Fira and Oia, with arguably the best panoramic view on the island.
Opened as Nobu Hotel in recent years after transformation of a prior luxury property — finishes and systems are fresh.
May-June and September-October for perfect weather without the July-August premium.
